auth.signInDesc: Sign in to your DigitalHub account.

about.title: About DigitalHub
about.subtitle: DigitalHub is your trusted marketplace for premium digital goods. We offer streaming accounts, game keys, software licenses, gift cards, and more — all at competitive prices with instant delivery.
about.missionP1: We believe everyone deserves access to quality digital services and entertainment without overpaying. Our platform connects buyers with the best digital goods at fair prices, backed by reliable support.
about.missionP2: Since our founding, we've served thousands of satisfied customers across the globe. Whether you need a Netflix subscription, a Steam game key, or a Microsoft Office license, we have you covered.
about.trustDesc: Every product is verified before listing. Your security is our top priority.
about.instantDesc: Digital goods delivered immediately after purchase — no waiting.
about.customerDesc: 24/7 support via Telegram ensures you always have help when you need it.
about.qualityDesc: We stand behind every product with our satisfaction guarantee.
about.readySubtitle: Browse our catalog or get in touch with our support team.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions about a product, need help with an order, or want to discuss a bulk purchase? Our support team is available 24/7 via Telegram.
contact.telegramDesc: Join our Telegram support channel for the fastest response. Click the button below to open a conversation.
contact.availableDesc: Our team is always ready to help, any time of day.
contact.fastResponseDesc: Get answers within minutes, not hours.
contact.privateDesc: Your conversations are private and secure.

footer.desc: Your trusted marketplace for premium digital goods. Streaming accounts, game keys, software licenses, and more — delivered instantly.
